response.step_by_step_log:
1. 00:00-03:19: Identified the performance of 'Hibikase' by Tokino Sora and Hoshimachi Suisei. OCR text on video top-left confirms the title. Original composer/lyricist identified as Giga/Reol.
2. 03:20-05:00: Talk segment, no music.
3. Lyrics were searched for 'ヒビカセ Reol' and 'Hibikase Reol english translation' and the full lyrics and translation were obtained from multiple reliable sources.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a dance performance by Tokino Sora and Hoshimachi Suisei to the song "Hibikase" (ヒビカセ), followed by a conversation between the two performers.

scenes.description: Tokino Sora and Hoshimachi Suisei perform 'Hibikase'. The video features them dancing and singing. The song 'Hibikase' is credited in the top-left corner.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
a sound gives its warning in the middle of the night
i 'm intoxicated by the consonance at midnight
with your touch , a light , an increasing fever
you have me dancing on your fingertip
i have an intuition , suddenly , a sensation
our secret nectar in the sleeping night
i have a sensation , suddenly , a pleasant feeling
i 'm fascinated by the overlapping waveforms
don't forget my voice
i don't care if it 's through the screen , love me properly
even if i 'm virtual , don't push me away
i still want to drown in your sound
remember my voice
and everything of this body you gave me
we look at each other , alone with you
make our breath and sound resonate
ask at midnight - cold heat
i 'm waiting at midnight
saturating in mirroring
sounds you do not know
sense immediate body feeling
sleeping night and breathing together
bodily immediate pleasure
rusted logic. "i 'm going to do it again"
don't forget my voice
signals that fly beyond dimensions
don't say it 's virtual
i still want to be loved by your sound
remember my voice
all this body you gave me
the first sound intersects the leaves of words
this breath , the sound , and the hibikase
i was just in love with the sound you created
sadness , anger , sweetheart
screaming constantly
love , excitement
be fascinated
don't forget my voice
i love you over the screen
don't let it go
i still want to drown in your sound
remember my voice
all this body you gave me
staring at you and you two
resonate your breath and sound
your first sound
otohibikase

scenes.description: The performance ends, and the VTubers engage in a conversation.
